name: telly-workflows
description: Static workflows and operational rules for telegram_mcp consoles.

interface.longDescription: Telly Workflows adds static Codex skills for partner-note execution, human Telegram replies, browser screenshots, and artifact-return paths without relying on ad-hoc polling or route guessing.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the telly-workflows skills when working through telegram_mcp, especially for partner-note execution, browser screenshots, and human Telegram replies.
